_doc: Crafting concepts — fundamental principles that underpin recipes. Displayed as scout-patch badges in the skill tree. Mastering concepts unlocks higher recipe tiers and reveals connections between recipes.

concepts.name: Heat Treatment
concepts.description: Controlling temperature to change material properties — hardening, tempering, annealing.

concepts.name: Friction
concepts.description: How surfaces interact — grip, wear, heat generation, polishing.

concepts.name: Tension
concepts.description: Stored energy in stretched or compressed materials — springs, bows, snares.

concepts.name: Rotating Parts
concepts.description: Axles, wheels, gears — converting motion between directions and speeds.

concepts.name: Bearings
concepts.description: Reducing friction in rotating joints — smooth surfaces, lubricants, rolling elements.

concepts.name: Leverage
concepts.description: Multiplying force through fulcrums, levers, and mechanical advantage.

concepts.name: Joinery
concepts.description: Connecting wood pieces — mortise-and-tenon, dovetails, pegs, lashing.

concepts.name: Tanning & Curing
concepts.description: Preserving and strengthening organic materials — salt curing, bark tanning, smoking.

concepts.name: Distillation
concepts.description: Separating and concentrating substances through heating and condensation.

concepts.name: Combustion
concepts.description: Controlled burning — fuel ratios, flash points, contained explosions.

concepts.name: Weaving & Binding
concepts.description: Interlocking fibers into sheets, ropes, and nets — warp, weft, tension control.

concepts.name: Edge & Point
concepts.description: Creating and maintaining cutting edges — grinding angles, stropping, honing.

concepts.name: Sealing & Waterproofing
concepts.description: Keeping water, air, or contaminants out — resin coating, wax, tar, caulking.

concepts.name: Fermentation
concepts.description: Controlled decay — yeasts, bacteria, time. Turns grain to ale, fruit to vinegar.

concepts.name: Counterweight
concepts.description: Balancing forces with opposing mass — cranes, drawbridges, balanced weapons.

concepts.name: Alloys
concepts.description: Mixing metals to create new properties — bronze, steel, brass.

concepts.name: Inscription
concepts.description: Carving symbols that hold meaning or power — runes, glyphs, maker's marks. You can prepare the physical medium; an enchanter fills it with power.
concepts.note: Player carves the channels; NPC enchanter activates them.

concepts.name: Resonance
concepts.description: How materials vibrate and amplify energy — tuning, harmonics, spirit-channeling. Understanding which shapes and materials hold enchantment best.
concepts.note: Knowing what resonates lets you build better vessels for enchantment — the mage still does the filling.

concepts.name: Conduit Craft
concepts.description: Building physical paths for magical energy to flow — grooves, inlays, crystal alignments. The plumbing of enchantment.
concepts.note: Player builds the conduit (engineering). Enchanter charges it (magic). Higher ranks = more complex enchantments can be housed.

concepts.name: Material Affinity
concepts.description: Which materials attract, hold, or repel magical energy. Iron grounds it, silver conducts it, bone stores it, crystal amplifies it.
concepts.note: Knowledge concept — lets you pick the right base material before bringing it to an enchanter.

concepts.name: Dissolution
concepts.description: Breaking substances down into base components using solvents — water, acid, alcohol.

concepts.name: Precipitation
concepts.description: Forcing dissolved substances back into solid form — crystals, pigments, sediments.

concepts.name: Oxidation & Corrosion
concepts.description: How materials react with air and moisture — rust, patina, tarnish. Prevention and exploitation.

concepts.name: Catalysis
concepts.description: Substances that speed reactions without being consumed — accelerants, enzymes, mineral dust.

concepts.name: Extraction
concepts.description: Pulling useful substances from raw materials — pressing, boiling, steeping, cold-extraction.

concepts.name: Neutralization
concepts.description: Countering one substance with another — acid with base, poison with antidote, fire with salt.

concepts.name: Sublimation
concepts.description: Solid to gas without liquid — capturing volatile essences, purifying metals, smoke-crafting.

concepts.name: Emulsification
concepts.description: Mixing things that don't want to mix — oil and water, fat and tincture. Stabilizers and agitation.

concepts.name: Toxicology
concepts.description: Understanding poisons and venoms — dosage, delivery, interaction. Harm and cure are the same knowledge.

concepts.name: Preservation
concepts.description: Stopping decay — salting, smoking, pickling, desiccation. Keeping things as they are.

concepts.name: Pigmentation & Dye
concepts.description: Creating and fixing color — mineral pigments, plant dyes, mordants, color-fastness.

categories.name: Alchemy
categories.description: Transformations through heat, time, and reaction

categories.name: Arcane
categories.description: Understanding magic enough to build for it — the engineering side of enchantment
